title: Verosa
description: Vanilla Minecraft how it could be with proper optimization mods. Enjoy the Pale Garden with high FPS, Play on any and all 1.21.4 Servers without the worry of mods halting you're fun. Client Side Only optimizations <3
body:
A optimization modpack that enhances the vanilla game.

## Performance
Verosa is a optimized version of Minecraft, Thanks to tons of performance mods like Sodium, Lithium and a ton others. Mods of which have been chosen solely for the purpose of enhancing the game while fixing bug's that allow the speed of the game to be enhanced on any device.

## Works everywhere
Verosa does not include content mods, so you can play on any world or server.

## Built on Fabric
Verosa uses the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods. You can use the modpack as a base to add your favorite mods to.


## FAQ
> Q: Do I need the modpack on a server?
> 
> A: No. This pack doesn't add any new content, Therfor you can play on any server that doesn't require content mods.

> Q: Will this come to a previous version of Minecraft?
>
> A: Yes! I plan to release this modpack for version 1.18 - 1.20.1 in the future

> Q: How do I add mods to the pack?
> 
> A: Drag and Drop mods into the Mod Menu screen once the game is open. Must be a .jar file
